An Open-Jaw Family Expedition · Summer MMXXVI

ITALY
by the lakes

Milano · Como · Garda & Monte Baldo · Verona

IN London LHR ✈ Milan◆ 3 nights on Lake Garda◆ OUT Verona / Venice ✈ London
City & Culture Heat-relief day — lake or mountain cooling Ferry / cable car
01
Mon 20 JulMILANO

Duomo & Galleria

Land at LHR → Milano. Up onto the cathedral rooftop among the spires, then ice cream under the glass dome of the Galleria. A gentle first afternoon.

LHR ✈ MXPRooftop terraces
02
Tue 21 JulMILANO

Navigli Canals

Castello Sforzesco park in the cool morning, then the Navigli canal district come evening — waterside dinner, street musicians, and an easy pace.

CastelloCanalside
03
HEAT RELIEF
Wed 22 JulLAKE COMO

Bellagio by Ferry

Train to Como, then hop the ferries to Bellagio. Cobbled lanes, gardens, and a swim off the shore. The lake breeze does the air-conditioning for you.

Ferry hopLake swim
04
HEAT RELIEF
Thu 23 JulLAKE GARDA

Beach Day, Sirmione

Settle into your Lake Garda base for three nights. First a pure beach day on the warm shallows at Sirmione — paddle, swim, and shaded gelato stops.

Base: 3 ntsLake beach
05
Fri 24 JulGARDA

Gardaland

A full day at Gardaland, Italy's biggest theme park — rides scaled from the 5-year-old's carousel to the 11-year-old's coasters, plus a water park to cool off.

Theme parkAll ages
06
HEAT RELIEF
Sat 25 JulMONTE BALDO

Cable Car, 1,760 m

From Malcesine the rotating cable car spins you up Monte Baldo. Twenty cool degrees cooler at the top, easy meadow trails, and the whole lake below.

Cable carMountain air
07
HEAT RELIEF
Sun 26 JulDOLOMITES

Foothills Day Trip

Drive north into the Dolomite foothills for the day — alpine meadows, a chairlift, and a picnic among the peaks. The big altitude escape from the heat.

Alpine meadowHigh & cool
08
Mon 27 JulVERONA

The Roman Arena

On to Verona. Climb the 2,000-year-old arena, wander to Juliet's balcony, and find shade in the Giardino Giusti's cypress terraces before the heat peaks.

Roman arenaGiusti garden
09
HEAT RELIEF
Tue 28 JulLAKE COMO

Last Lake Morning

One more lake morning — a final swim and a slow lakeside lunch — before packing. A quiet, unhurried day to close the trip out by the water.

Lake morningPack up
10
Wed 29 JulDEPARTURE

Fly Home

Open-jaw pays off: short hop to Verona or Venice airport and fly back to London — no looping back to Milan. One last Italian espresso before the gate.

VRN/VCE ✈ LHRHome
10Days
3Lakes
5Cooling Days
1,760Metres up · Baldo
5·8·11Ages aboard

Open-jaw routing flies you into Milan and home from Verona or Venice, so no day is spent retracing your steps. Five of ten days are built around water or altitude — the lakes, the ferries, the cable car, the Dolomite foothills — to keep a July trip comfortable for young legs.

Photographs: Wikimedia Commons · For family planning use
